name: Coconut Ring Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 12-cup Bundt pan.
Beat all ingredients except coconut and powdered sugar in a large bowl on low speed, scraping sides frequently, for 30 seconds. Beat on medium speed, scraping sides occasionally, for 4 minutes; stir in coconut. Pour into prepared pan. Bake until tested with a toothpick or thermometer (batter is set and springs back when touched), about 55-60 minutes. Cool for 5 minutes; invert onto a wire rack or heatproof serving plate. Remove pan; cool cake completely. Sprinkle with powdered sugar.
HIGH ALTITUDE: Preheat oven to 375°F. Decrease Bisquick to 2 1/2 cups and sugar to 1 1/4 cups. Increase flour to 1 cup. Bake for 45-50 minutes.
